name: The Shadeborn
inspire: Immediately after a friendly fighter Attacks a damaged enemy fighter, Inspire that friendly fighter.

abilities.name: Shademark
abilities.flavorText: The Shadeborn all bear a brand of Ulguan magic upon their souls, a sinister mark that grants them the ability to briefly become as insubstantial as mist.
abilities.rulesText: Each time you make a Save roll for a friendly fighter in enemy territory or on a cover token, you can re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll.

abilities.name: Gloomweb Hex
abilities.flavorText: Aelven curses grant the shadows a malicious life.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Enemy fighters that are adjacent to or on a feature token in the next turn have -1 Save dice. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Dark Lamprey
abilities.flavorText: The hungering shadows lash out at any unwary souls.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Pick an enemy fighter that is not vulnerable and within 3 hexes of a friendly fighter. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Impenetrable Darkness
abilities.flavorText: The Shadeborn vanish into choking gloom.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Give each friendly fighter a shadow token. Fighters with any shadow tokens are treated as being on a cover token. Remove all shadow tokens at the end of the battle round. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Shadow Ambush
abilities.flavorText: Wherever darkness falls, the Shadeborn stalk.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter is picked to Move if that fighter is on a cover token. Remove that fighter from the battlefield and place them in an empty edge hex in enemy territory. Then, give that fighter a Move token. You can only use this ability once per game.
